name: Test News Digest
description: Quick test job with single news source for manual triggering. Uses TEST_DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL from .env if discord.webhook_url is not set in this config.
system_prompt: You are a news summarizer. Create a brief summary of the provided news articles. Be concise and highlight only the most important points.
user_prompt_format: Summarize these news articles in 2-3 bullet points:
